[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 111010111 7
2 000011000 2
3 010111010 5
4 101100010 4
5 111110111 8
6 011111001 6
7 010011010 4
